# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-jwt-authn
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: your-api-service
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: "https://your-auth-provider.com/realms/your-realm"
    jwksUri: "https://your-auth-provider.com/realms/your-realm/protocol/openid-connect/certs"
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - header: x-jwt-sub
      claim: sub
    - header: x-jwt-aud
      claim: aud
    - header: x-jwt-exp
      claim: exp
    - header: x-jwt-nbf
      claim: nbf
    - header: x-jwt-iat
      claim: iat
    - header: x-jwt-iss
      claim: iss
    - header: x-jwt-jti
      claim: jti
    - header: x-jwt-azp
      claim: azp
    - header: x-jwt-typ
      claim: typ
    - header: x-jwt-preferred-username
      claim: preferred_username
    - header: x-jwt-email
      claim: email
    - header: x-jwt-email-verified
      claim: email_verified
    - header: x-jwt-given-name
      claim: given_name
    - header: x-jwt-family-name
      claim: family_name
    - header: x-jwt-name
      claim: name
    - header: x-jwt-groups
      claim: groups
    - header: x-jwt-scope
      claim: scope
    outputPayloadToHeader: x-jwt-payload
